from biomni.tool.literature import query_pubmed

# Query 1: general GWAS for myeloproliferative neoplasms / disorders
query1 = "myeloproliferative neoplasm GWAS association locus 4p16 NSD2 FGFR3 TACC3"
result1 = query_pubmed(query1, max_papers=5)
print("Result 1:\n", result1)

# Query 2: search for NSD2 (WHSC1/MMSET) association with myeloproliferative disorders or MPN GWAS
query2 = "NSD2 WHSC1 myeloproliferative neoplasm GWAS"
result2 = query_pubmed(query2, max_papers=5)
print("\nResult 2:\n", result2)

# Query 3: search for MAEA and myeloproliferative disorders
query3 = "MAEA myeloproliferative neoplasm GWAS"
result3 = query_pubmed(query3, max_papers=5)
print("\nResult 3:\n", result3)
</execute>
